# Nerudek

> Polish model, photographer, and AI content creator. Free browser-based tools at nerudek.com/tools.

Nerudek (Iwona) is a professional model and content creator based in Poland. She creates fashion photography, AI-assisted content, and offers free online tools that run entirely in the browser — no data leaves your device.

## Free Tools
- Images: WebP→JPG, remove background, compress image, HEIC→JPG, image to SVG
- Developer: Glass CSS generator, QR code generator, code diff viewer, PDF to Word
- Text: Word counter with SEO metrics, case converter
- AI: Prompt enhancer for Stable Diffusion and ChatGPT

## Content
Fashion photography, vibe coding, AI tools, modeling techniques.

## Contact
For collaborations: nerudek.com
